# HPD-ML-Serialization-Zip

- Package: `HPD-ML-Serialization-Zip`
- Version: `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.Serialization.Zip`
- Exported types: 8

## HPD.ML.Serialization.Zip

- [`IParameterWriter`](../types/hpd-ml-serialization-zip-iparameterwriter.md) - Type-specific serializer for learned parameters. Each parameter type gets its own writer that knows how to efficiently serialize its data as binary + JSON metadata.
- [`IParameterWriter<TParams>`](../types/hpd-ml-serialization-zip-iparameterwriter-tparams.md) - Strongly-typed version for registration convenience.
- [`Manifest`](../types/hpd-ml-serialization-zip-manifest.md) - Manifest stored at the root of the ZIP archive.
- [`NeuralNetworkParameterWriter`](../types/hpd-ml-serialization-zip-neuralnetworkparameterwriter.md) - Undocumented in the published XML file.
- [`ParameterWriterRegistry`](../types/hpd-ml-serialization-zip-parameterwriterregistry.md) - Maps ILearnedParameters types to their serialization writers. Domain packages may register their own writers; HPD.ML-owned parameter types are registered by the serializer.
- [`TransformEntry`](../types/hpd-ml-serialization-zip-transformentry.md) - Undocumented in the published XML file.
- [`ZipFormat`](../types/hpd-ml-serialization-zip-zipformat.md) - ZIP archive serialization format.
- [`ZipSerializer`](../types/hpd-ml-serialization-zip-zipserializer.md) - Saves and loads IModel as ZIP archives.
